description: Derived stage windows and counts for labeller stage selection.
sql: WITH base AS (SELECT site, frac_id, source_file, name, stage_num, created_ts, datetime_fmt, rate_slurry, prop_conc_blend_denso, press_mainline, records_in_bucket FROM datastore:historian_telemetry_v1 WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND stage_num IS NOT NULL AND datetime_fmt IS NOT NULL) SELECT site, frac_id, source_file, name, stage_num, CAST(MIN(datetime_fmt) AS TEXT) AS stage_start_ts, CAST(MAX(datetime_fmt) AS TEXT) AS stage_end_ts, CAST(MIN(created_ts) AS TEXT) AS first_created_ts, CAST(MAX(created_ts) AS TEXT) AS last_created_ts, COUNT(*) AS sample_count, SUM(records_in_bucket) AS source_record_count, AVG(rate_slurry) AS avg_rate_slurry, MAX(rate_slurry) AS max_rate_slurry, AVG(press_mainline) AS avg_press_mainline, MAX(press_mainline) AS max_press_mainline, AVG(prop_conc_blend_denso) AS avg_prop_conc_blend_denso, MAX(prop_conc_blend_denso) AS max_prop_conc_blend_denso FROM base GROUP BY site, frac_id, source_file, name, stage_num ORDER BY name ASC, stage_num ASC
